svg.title: Dehradun Weather Analysis Project Roadmap
svg.desc: A 10-step roadmap for the Dehradun Weather Analysis portfolio project, grouped into 4 phases.

g.text: Step 1 — Dataset audit ✓
Load CSVs, check shape, nulls, dtypes, date range — COMPLETE
Step 2 — Data cleaning
Handle nulls, fix dtypes, parse dates, remove duplicates
Step 3 — Feature engineering
Add month, season, year columns; rolling averages
Step 4 — Descriptive statistics
Mean, median, std, min/max per feature and season
Step 5 — Temperature trend analysis
Line charts: monthly/yearly temp trends, hottest/coldest days
Step 6 — Rainfall & humidity analysis
Bar charts: monsoon patterns, wet vs dry months
Step 7 — Correlation analysis
Heatmap: temp vs humidity vs rainfall; scatter plots
Step 8 — Seasonal & anomaly detection
Box plots by season; flag outlier days (Z-score or IQR)
Step 9 — ML model (weather prediction)
Train classifier (Random Forest); evaluate accuracy, F1
Step 10 — Report + Streamlit dashboard
Write findings; deploy interactive app on Hugging Face
